mapper.insert:
insert into setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, copies, price, name) values
(#{setmealDish.setmealId}, #{setmealDish.dishId}, #{setmealDish.copies}, #{setmealDish.price}, #{setmealDish.name})
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal_dish where setmeal_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select setmeal_id from setmeal_dish where dish_id in
#{id}
